sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, arr Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_arrays SET arr = arrayPopBack(arr) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayPopBack(arr) AS modified_arr FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayPopBack(arr) AS modified_arr FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2;
